raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wisch rakstija arridsan
Grahmatas to KUNGU Israē-
ta Deewu mehdidams/ un prett
wiꞥſch ta runnadams/ un fazzi-
dams: Ittin ka tee Deewi to
Semmes Tautu ſawus Laudis
no mannas Rohkas ne irr is-
glahbufchi/ ta patt neds Iski-
jus Deews ſawus Laudis no
mannas Rohkas tsglahbs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee fauze ar stipru
Balsi judiski prett teem Jerusa-
lemes Laudim/ kas us to Muh-
ri bija/ ka tee tohs tsbeedetu un
istruhzinatu / ka tee to Pilsfah-
tu warretu usreint.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee runnaja prett to
Deewu no Jerusalemes ta patt /
ka prett teem Deetweem to Pa-
faules Lauschu/kas Zilweku Roh-
ka Darvs irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tas Kehnisch Iski-
jus un tas Praweets Esaijus A-
moza Dehls peeluhdse pretti to/
un fauze us Debbeſim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS fuhttija
weenu Engeli/ kas wiꞥſus war-
renus Karra-Wihrus un Leelus-
Kungus un Wirfneekus ceelfch to
Affirijas Kehnixa Lehgert no-
maitaja/ ka tas ar Kannu attat
fawa Seimmê atgreeſahs. Un
tad wiꞥſch ſawa Deewa Nam-
mã gabje/ tad nokawe wiꞥſu ar
Sohbinn tee / kas no wiꞥſa
Meefahm bij zehlutchees-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta atpestija tas KUNGē
Iskiju/ un tohs Jerusalemes Ee-
dshwotajus no Saneriba ta At-
firiju Kehnixa Rohkas/ un no
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "wiſhu zittu Rohkas/ un wo
ja tohs wiſsapkahrt.
Un dauds neffe tum R
GAM Dahwanas us Jeru-
ni/ un dahrgas Leetas Ist-
tam Kehnixam no Juhda.
ka wiſch pehz to preeſch wiſ
Paganeein pa-augstinahts to
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tanni Laika tappe
jus us patcbu Mirschannu ne-
fels/ un wiſch luhdse to R
GU/ tas runnaja us to/ um
tam weenu Brihnuna-Sih-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet Iskijus ne atm-
ja ta / ka wiſnam bija la-
rihts/ jo wiſna Sirds fahz-
potees/ tapehz nahze pahr wi-
un pahr Juhdu / un Jerusa-
leela Dufniba.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tatschu paseinmojahs
kijus ſawas Sirds Lepn-
deht/ ar teem Jerusalemes
dshwotajeem/ tapehz ne nahz-
KUNGA Bahrsiba pahr ni-
xeem/ kamehr Iskijus dshw-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Iskijum bija
dauds Baggatibas un Goh-
un wiſch darrija few Man-
Rambarus preeſch Sudrab-
nu Seltn/ un dahrgem Ak-
neem/ un dahrgahn Sahleh-
un preeſchturramahm Br-
nahn / un preeſch wiſfade-
dahrgem Rihkeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ir Spikerus pree-
Labbibas Augteem/ un Wi-
un Etji/un Staltus preeſch ni-
fadeem Lohpeein / nn Laida-
preeſch teem gannameem P-
keem.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
